110.name_zh: 绝对牵引 PR-S3 牵引光束

110.name: ViseLock S3 Tractor Beam
110.name_zh: 视定 S3 牵引光束

28.name: Item Type
28.description: Defines the kind of mining component: passive, active, placeable gadget, etc.

28.name: Optimal Charge Window Size
28.description: Size of the green zone. Bigger = easier to stay within it and fracture successfully.

28.name: Optimal Charge Window Rate
28.description: Speed at which the optimal (green) zone shifts during charging. Affects how steady you need to be.

28.name: Laser Instability
28.description: Affects how erratic the laser energy input is. Lower = smoother laser response.

28.name: Resistance
28.description: Alters rock resistance. Higher resistance = more laser power needed.

28.name: Instability
28.description: Adds or reduces the rock’s instability stat. Lower = more stable = easier to control charge.

28.name: Cluster Modifier
28.description: Multiplier to how many chunks a rock breaks into. Affects post-fracture collectability.

29.name: Optimal Range
29.description: Ideal distance from the rock for the gadget’s effect to be strongest.

29.name: Maximum Range
29.description: How far from the rock you can place/activate the gadget.

29.name: Mining Laser Power
29.description: Boosts the strength of your mining laser.

29.name: Extraction Laser Power
29.description: Affects extraction phase power — useful when pulling in fractured materials.

29.name: Module Slots
29.description: Number of consumable slots available on the component.

29.name: Laser Instability
29.description: Affects how erratic the laser energy input is. Lower = smoother laser response.

29.name: Optimal Charge Window Rate
29.description: Speed at which the optimal (green) zone shifts during charging. Affects how steady you need to be.

29.name: Inert Material Level
29.description: Reduces the amount of inert (worthless) material in the rock, increasing overall yield quality.

29.name: Optimal Charge Window Size
29.description: Size of the green zone. Bigger = easier to stay within it and fracture successfully.

29.name: Resistance
29.description: Alters rock resistance. Higher resistance = more laser power needed.

29.name: Collection Throughput
29.description: How fast material is pulled in during extraction. Higher = faster cargo fill.

29.name: Throttle min
29.description: The minimum laser throttle level the rock will respond to. Higher = less fine control.

29.name: Power Transfer
29.description: Modifies how much energy from the laser transfers to the rock. Boost this to make tough rocks easier to heat up.

29.name: Instability
29.description: Adds or reduces the rock’s instability stat. Lower = more stable = easier to control charge.

30.name: Item Type
30.description: Defines the kind of mining component: passive, active, placeable gadget, etc.

30.name: Optimal Charge Window Size
30.description: Size of the green zone. Bigger = easier to stay within it and fracture successfully.

30.name: Mining Laser Power
30.description: Boosts the strength of your mining laser.

30.name: Extraction Laser Power
30.description: Affects extraction phase power — useful when pulling in fractured materials.

30.name: Optimal Charge Rate
30.description: How fast energy builds up within the optimal (green) zone. Higher = faster, but riskier if you overshoot.

30.name: Inert Material Level
30.description: Reduces the amount of inert (worthless) material in the rock, increasing overall yield quality.

30.name: Catastrophic Charge Rate
30.description: Rate at which the rock’s energy charge builds toward the catastrophic (red) zone. Higher = riskier.

30.name: Resistance
30.description: Alters rock resistance. Higher resistance = more laser power needed.

30.name: Duration
30.description: How long the gadget’s effects last once activated.

30.name: Uses
30.description: How many times the gadget can be activated before it's depleted or breaks. Some are single-use, others reusable.

30.name: Laser Instability
30.description: Affects how erratic the laser energy input is. Lower = smoother laser response.

30.name: Shatter Damage
30.description: Sometimes used for how violently a rock breaks apart (possibly placeholder or underused stat).

35.name: Size
35.name_zh: 尺寸

35.name: Volume
35.name_zh: 体积

82.name: Volume
82.name_zh: 体积

83.name: Size
83.description: Defines the component’s physical size and compatibility with ship hardpoints. Only matching sizes can be installed.

83.name: Grade Letter
83.description: Indicates the quality level of a component within the same size (A–D), affecting overall performance and efficiency.

83.name: Class
83.description: Defines the component’s intended role and performance profile (e.g. Military, Industrial, Civilian, Stealth), influencing behavior such as durability, efficiency, and emissions.

83.name: Grade Numeric
83.description: Indicates the quality level of a component within the same size (1-4), affecting overall performance and efficiency.
